content: # ArtChat 24-Domain Ecosystem вЂ” AI IDE Context # Drop this file into any AI-powered IDE as project context # Compatible with: Cursor, Windsurf, Zed, VS Code + Copilot, Warp, Antigravity, etc. ## Project Overview Multi-domain digital business ecosystem built on Whop (whop.com). 24 domains, each with a branded landing page that routes to Whop checkout popups. Revenue flows through Whop Payments Network. All domains share a single Whop company backend. ## Company - **Whop Company ID**: biz_WKmNzKeXAiu2ks - **Route**: artchat-ampvote-epiccab-tagvote - **Whop Page**: https://whop.com/artchat-ampvote-epiccab-tagvote/ ## Architecture ``` [24 Domains] в†’ [cPanel Hosting] в†’ [Static HTML + .htaccess] в†“ (popup checkout onclick) [Whop Checkout Sessions] в†’ [Whop Payments Network] в†“ [Product Access] в†’ [Whop Experiences: Chat, Forums, Courses, Content] ``` ## Repository Structure ``` artchat-domains/ в”њв”Ђв”Ђ README.md в”њв”Ђв”Ђ REDIRECT_REFERENCE.md # URL nextwavenetwork.com | #0984e3 | | paylicious.com | #55efc4 | | quoteparty.com | #fab1a0 | | splitcite.com | #74b9ff | | summerjobswap.com | #fdcb6e | | tag.vote | #00b894 | | yo.life | #a29bfe | | yocloud.com | #636e72 | | yoservice.com | #fdcb6e | ## Checkout URLs (Whop Popup Pattern) All domains use this popup checkout JS вЂ” do NOT change the pattern: ```javascript function oc(e,u){e.preventDefault();var w=500,h=700,l=(screen.width-w)/2,t=(screen.height-h)/2;window.open(u,'whop_checkout','width='+w+',height='+h+',left='+l+',top='+t+',scrollbars=yes,resizable=yes');} ``` Link pattern: `CTA Text` ### ArtChat Checkout Sessions | Plan | Session URL | |------|------------| | Free Forever | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_WqXDaZLgvPv4G/?session=ch_zkQHkjKc3s8AA1N | | Creator Monthly $29/mo | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_hqdgnRJSzMvBH/?session=ch_nlCr8enLRUReRGj | | Creator Annual $249/yr | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_3ppQM4AM8RAim/?session=ch_6OBePTnO0DhGgJl | | Business Monthly $99/mo | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_kgmqlNkYeKQCy/?session=ch_vQ20BMOikmSA2h2 | ### SummerJobSwap Checkout Sessions | Plan | Session URL | |------|------------| | Pro Monthly $19/mo | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_Dq08GRMfjoEoB/?session=ch_jXkLRzpxVR6Bl8d | | Summer Pass $49 | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_OHaghPC6Ri2GA/?session=ch_mlVaqgzhqPCwCvG | | Employer Monthly $79/mo | https://whop.com/checkout/plan_no8oc1YGrf2jm/?session=ch_ekdzQgvBIhdiRsn | ## Promo Codes (embed in landing pages where appropriate) | Code | Discount | Applies To | Expires | |------|----------|-----------|---------| | LAUNCH20 | 20% off, 3 months | Creator Monthly | ~Jun 7, 2026 | | EARLYBIRD | $10 off, 1 month | Business Monthly | ~Jun 7, 2026 | | ANNUAL30 | 30% off, 1 cycle | Creator Annual | ~Jun 7, 2026 | | COMEBACK | 25% off, 2 months | All paid plans (churned) | ~Jun 7, 2026 | | SUMMER25 | 25% off, 3 months | SJS Pro Monthly | Aug 31, 2026 | | HIRE50 | 15% off, 2 months | SJS Employer Monthly | Aug 31, 2026 | ## Social Links | Domain | Platform | URL | |--------|----------|-----| | 720.chat | Discord | discord.gg/X65dHfmnbX | | 720.chat | Facebook | Facebook.com/720chat | | 720.chat | Instagram | instagram.com/720chat | | epic.cab | Telegram | t.me/+6RUdERX1EKo2YTRh | | tag.vote | Discord | discord.gg/Err7Hnw9ch | | tag.vote | YouTube | @tag-vote | ## .htaccess Standard Template Every domain gets this .htaccess (adjust domain-specific values): ```apache RewriteEngine On RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [L,R=301] # Security Headers Header set X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" Header set X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" Header set X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" Header set Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" # Caching ExpiresActive On ExpiresByType text/html "access plus 1 hour" ExpiresByType text/css "access plus 1 week" ExpiresByType application/javascript "access plus 1 week" ExpiresByType image/png "access plus 1 month" ExpiresByType image/jpeg "access plus 1 month" ExpiresByType image/svg+xml "access plus 1 month" # Compression AddOutputFilterByType DEFLATE text/html text/css application/javascript # Block directory listing Options -Indexes ``` ## Versioning Protocol - **Zip generations** stored in `versions/` directory - Naming: `v{MAJOR}.{MINOR}.{PATCH}_{YYYY-MM-DD}.zip` - MAJOR: Breaking layout/structure changes - MINOR: New features, new domains, new checkout sessions - PATCH: Copy edits, color tweaks, bug fixes - Always create a new version zip BEFORE deploying changes - Keep last 10 versions minimum for rollback capability ## Deployment - **Hosting**: cPanel shared hosting - **Method**: SFTP upload or cPanel Git auto-deploy - **Each domain** maps to its own document root in cPanel - **5 redirect domains** (tag.ooo, rooz.live, o-gov.com, masslessmassive.com, eudmusic.com) are cPanel subdomain redirects вЂ” no HTML files needed ## Development Rules 1. **Never modify checkout URLs** without updating the Whop checkout session 2. **Never remove the popup checkout pattern** вЂ” it keeps users on-domain 3. **All prices must match Whop plan prices exactly** вЂ” do not hardcode prices that differ 4. **Brand color must match the domain's assigned hex** from the table above 5. **summerjobswap.com uses SJS-specific plans** вЂ” different pricing tier than ArtChat domains 6. **Test every checkout link** in a 500x700 popup before deploying 7. **Preserve .htaccess files** вЂ” they enforce HTTPS, security headers, and caching 8. **Mobile-first responsive design** вЂ” all landing pages must work on mobile ## Design Philosophy - Minimal, fast-loading static HTML (no frameworks, no build step) - Each domain has its own visual identity via brand color - Gradient backgrounds, subtle depth, modern typography - Clear CTA hierarchy: Free в†’ Creator в†’ Business - Social proof elements where available - Accessible (WCAG AA contrast ratios) ## IDE-Specific Notes - **Cursor/Windsurf/Copilot**: Use this file as project context (.cursorrules, .windsurfrules, or paste into chat) - **Zed**: Add to assistant context panel - **Warp**: Reference in AI command context - **Antigravity**: Include as workspace knowledge - For all IDEs: open the `domains/` folder as workspace root for domain-specific work - For cross-domain changes: open the repo root to batch-edit shared patterns
